title: Redstone Armoury Minus Thermal
description: Redstone Armoury, now on Modrinth and minus Thermal dep.
body:
This version of Redstone Armoury does not depend on Thermal Expansion.
Still depends on Redstone Arsenal, obviously.

![lole](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9376debfab7fc5b4acfa7745be4507aafd3136c3.png)
